title: Transparent Plastic Gloves, Pack of 100 - Disposable, Perfect for Small Household and DIY Jobs
features: UNIVERSAL FIT: Designed to cater to everyone's needs, these gloves feature a one-size-fits-all construction ensuring a snug fit for all hand sizes.

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from high-quality plastic, these gloves are crafted to withstand rigorous use. Durable yet lightweight, they offer protection without compromising on dexterity, allowing you to perform tasks with precision.

DISPOSABLE CONVENIENCE: These gloves are designed for single-use, making them a convenient option for tasks that require cleanliness and hygiene. After use, they can be easily disposed of, minimizing clean-up time and maximizing efficiency.

VERSATILE UTILITY: Each package includes 100 transparent disposable gloves, perfect for a multitude of small household chores, DIY projects, and routine cleaning tasks. An essential accessory for maintaining cleanliness around the home or workspace.

EASY TO STORE: These gloves come in a compact pack that can easily be stored in household drawers or cabinets when not in use. This makes them readily accessible whenever you need them without taking up valuable space.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of Disposable Gloves contains one hundred individual gloves that are ideal for small household DIY jobs. Safety Warning No warning applicable
